dev_focus: BOLT TASK C2505: Packeta SOAP shipment creation — core shipping integration needed for launch. (1) `npm install soap`. (2) Implement `src/lib/shipping/packeta.ts` — SOAP client connecting to `https://www.zasilkovna.cz/api/soap` (WSDL: `?wsdl`). Functions: `createPacket(order)` → returns packetId, `getPacketLabel(packetId)` → base64 PDF, `getPacketStatus(packetId)` → status object, `cancelPacket(packetId)`. Use env var `PACKETA_API_PASSWORD`. Required fields for createPacket: apiPassword, number (order ID), name, surname, value (CZK decimal), weight (kg, 3 decimals, min 0.001 — use 0.5 default for clothing), addressId (numeric point.id from Packeta widget), eshop (sender label). Optional: email, phone, cod, currency 'CZK'. (3) Add `packetId String?` to Order model in schema.prisma + migrate. (4) Admin order detail: add 'Vytvořit zásilku' button (Server Action) — visible when order has shippingMethod='packeta' + shippingPointId set + no packetId yet. On success: store packetId on order, show 'Stáhnout štítek' link that fetches label PDF via packetsLabelsPdf. (5) Gotchas: weight=0 rejected, addressId must be numeric string. ALSO: mark TODO Phase 9 'Upozornit mě na podobné kousky' as [x] DONE — NotifyMeForm is live on both regular and sold PDP (verified: page.tsx lines 22, 361, 650).
notes: C2505 Lead — NotifyMeForm PDP opt-in ✅ DONE (C2500-2501, verified in page.tsx). Trace wasted 5 consecutive cycles (2501-2505) auditing nothing — paused until Bolt commits. Packeta SOAP is the highest-impact remaining BOLT task — it's the core shipping integration. Widget is done (C2370), SOAP packet creation is the missing piece. After Packeta: delivery deadline tracking (Czech law 30d). Backlog at 10 real open items (healthy).

schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name → run_every integer (overrides DB value)

session_manager.kill_zombie_tasks: bool — kill tasks stuck as 'running' for >30min
session_manager.requeue_failed: list of task IDs to requeue (max 5)
session_manager.reset_no_change_counter: bool — prevent auto-pause from consecutive no-change cycles
